Our Story

A little magic, piped by hand

LinLin began baking from home, turning buttercream into tiny worlds — castles, carousels and painterly skies that felt straight out of a storybook. After thousands of celebrations, LinLin Cake Shop now has a home in KL, where every cake is still made to order, by hand, with love.

5,000+Cakes made
100%Hand-piped
2020Baking since
How to Order

Your cake, in three steps

Choose your dream

Pick a signature design or share your fairytale theme with us.

Reserve your date

WhatsApp us 5–7 days ahead — these cakes take time to hand-pipe.

Pickup or delivery

Collect at The Pocket or have it delivered across the Klang Valley.
